cancelPurchase.title: Cancel your order
cancelPurchase.description: Cancel your order within 14 days. Your order number and email are all you need, no login required.
cancelPurchase.intro: You have fourteen days to cancel a purchase. Enter your order number and email, and we'll take care of the rest. No login, no need to contact customer service.
cancelPurchase.formError: Enter an order number and a valid email address.
cancelPurchase.chooseRefund: Choose how you'd like to be refunded.
cancelPurchase.cashDescription: We'll refund the full amount to the same card or account.
cancelPurchase.creditDescription: You get 110 percent of the amount to shop for.
cancelPurchase.cashDoneTitle: Your refund is on its way
cancelPurchase.cashDoneBody: The full amount will be refunded to the same card or account within a few banking days.
cancelPurchase.creditDoneBody: Your store credit worth 110 percent of the amount is ready to use at checkout.

about.title: Our story
about.description: The story behind Fyndlådan, vintage jewelry in original condition from a Swedish department store.
about.paragraph1: A Swedish department store closed down. What was left were boxes of earrings, necklaces and bracelets that never made it to the shop floor, in their original packaging, in original condition.
about.paragraph2: We bought the whole lot. Now we're selling it on, at fixed prices, exactly as it sat in the stockroom.
about.closingLine: It's the only shipment that's coming. Once a find is gone, it's gone to someone else.

notFound.title: This find is gone
notFound.body: The page you're looking for doesn't exist, or the find has already sold. More finds are waiting in the stockroom.

emailCapture.consent: I'd like to receive newsletters with offers and new finds. I can unsubscribe at any time.
emailCapture.consentRequired: Check the consent box to become a member.
emailCapture.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again shortly.
emailCapture.noThanks: No thanks, I'll pay full price

bundlePage.title: Build your own gift box
bundlePage.description: Pick your favorite pieces, gather them in your tray, and get it all in a gift box at a fixed price.
bundlePage.subheading: Fill the box, one fixed price

terms.title: Terms of purchase
terms.description: General terms of purchase for Fyndlådan.
terms.pricesBody: All prices are shown in Swedish kronor (SEK) including VAT. We reserve the right to correct pricing and stock errors.
terms.orderBody: A purchase agreement is made once your order is confirmed at checkout. Since stock is limited, an item may sell out before your order is completed.
terms.paymentBody: Payment is handled securely via Shopify checkout, using the payment methods shown there.
terms.couponsBody: One discount code may be used per order unless stated otherwise. Discount codes cannot be combined and are valid for the stated period.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.description: How Fyndlådan handles your personal data.
privacy.intro: We care about your privacy and handle your personal data in accordance with the GDPR. Below is a brief summary of how we handle your data.
privacy.collectBody: When you make a purchase, we collect the data needed to process your order, such as name, address and contact details. When you sign up for our newsletter, we store your email address.
privacy.useBody: The data is used to process your purchases, provide customer service and, if you have opted in, send offers. Payment and order handling are done via Shopify.
privacy.rightsBody: You have the right to request an extract, correction or deletion of your data. Contact us at

shipping.title: Shipping and returns
shipping.description: Information about shipping, delivery time and returns at Fyndlådan.
shipping.shippingBody: We ship with tracked delivery within Sweden. Shipping cost and delivery options are shown at checkout, handled securely via Shopify.
shipping.timeBody: Orders are normally packed within 1 to 3 business days. Postal delivery time is added on top of that.
shipping.returnBody: You have a 14-day right of withdrawal under Swedish distance selling law. The item must be returned unused.
